title.en: In vitro diagnostic test systems — Requirements for blood-glucose monitoring systems for self-testing in managing diabetes mellitus

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for in vitro glucose monitoring systems that measure glucose concentrations in capillary blood samples.

title.en: In vitro diagnostic medical devices — Information supplied by the manufacturer (labelling) — Part 1: Terms, definitions and general requirements

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for information supplied by the manufacturer of in vitro diagnostic medical devices, including reagents, instruments and specimen receptacles.

title.en: In vitro diagnostic test systems - Requirements for blood-glucose monitoring systems for self-testing in managing diabetes mellitus

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for blood-glucose monitoring systems for self-testing.
standards.scope: In vitro diagnostic medical devices -- Requirements for blood-glucose monitoring systems for self-testing in managing diabetes mellitus.

title.en: Medical laboratories - Requirements for quality and competence

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for quality and competence in medical laboratories, including pre-examination, examination and post-examination processes.
standards.scope: Medical laboratories -- Requirements for quality and competence (European adopted version).
